summary: StatusBadge component integration verified successfully. All 7 test cases passed: Login flow, Dashboard loading, StatusBadge in List View (5 badges with left-border), StatusBadge in Active Commissions widget (5 badges with left-border), StatusBadge in LeadDetailModal Details tab, no console errors related to DARK_STATUS_COLORS or StatusBadge imports.
critical_code_review_comments: StatusBadge component correctly implemented with data-testid='status-badge-{status}' pattern
Left-border accent style (border-l-[3px]) properly applied to all StatusBadge instances
StatusBadge successfully replaced hardcoded status spans in Dashboard.tsx (Active Commissions, List View)
StatusBadge successfully integrated in LeadDetailModal.tsx Details tab
StatusBadge successfully integrated in IndustryWidgets.tsx (Photography, FineArt, Design widgets)
DARK_STATUS_COLORS mappings successfully removed - no console errors
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test account with 5 leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: StatusBadge component uses Linear-style left-border accent design. Component located at /frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx. Uses STATUS_CONFIG mapping for colors. data-testid format: status-badge-{status.toLowerCase()}. Onboarding wizard and tour overlay may block UI interactions - use JavaScript to dismiss them.

StatusBadge_In_LeadDetailModal.details: StatusBadge in Details tab: status-badge-reviewing with 'Reviewing' text and left-border style

No_DARK_STATUS_COLORS_Errors.details: No console errors related to DARK_STATUS_COLORS or StatusBadge imports

Industry_Widgets.details: Code review confirms StatusBadge imported and used in PhotographyWidgets (line 201), FineArtWidgets (line 288), DesignWidgets
